# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/), version 2.1.

In short: we pledge to make participation in the Stele community a harassment-free experience for everyone, and to act in ways that foster an open, welcoming, diverse, inclusive, and healthy community.

## Reporting

Instances of abusive, harassing, or otherwise unacceptable behavior may be reported to the project maintainers at **conduct@steledb.com**. All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly. Maintainers are obligated to respect the privacy and security of the reporter of any incident.

## Enforcement

Maintainers will follow the Contributor Covenant's [Enforcement Guidelines](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/#enforcement-guidelines) (Correction → Warning → Temporary Ban → Permanent Ban) in determining consequences for any action they deem in violation of this Code of Conduct.

The full text is available at https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/.
